summary: [deterministic] all deterministic checks passed for engineering-vllm-inference-blueprint | [judge] Deployment approval is blocked. I could not perform primary repository inspection or independently execute the required validation commands in this session because every available local execution path failed before any repo command started. Without direct code inspection and local proof of the streaming HTTP behavior, request deserialization, and quality gates, I will not approve production deployment based only on an implementation worker's self-report.

findings.title: Primary code inspection is blocked by the runtime sandbox
findings.body: I was unable to read the checked-out repository or inspect the changed files directly. That means I could not confirm the handler architecture, request/response type changes, SSE framing implementation, or whether the code follows repository conventions.
findings.evidence: `exec_command` attempts for `pwd`, `git status --short`, and `sed -n '1,220p' /home/drew/.agents/skills/differential-review/SKILL.md` all failed immediately with `bwrap: loopback: Failed RTM_NEWADDR: Operation not permitted`. A direct `js_repl` filesystem read attempt also exited with the same `bwrap` error.

findings.title: Required quality gates were not independently proven in this review session
findings.body: The approval bar explicitly requires `cargo test --workspace` and `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings` to pass. I could not run those commands locally, so the release gates remain unproven from a principal-review standpoint.
findings.evidence: No local command execution path was available. The only positive evidence is the prior implementation worker's summary claiming `cargo fmt --all -- --check`, `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings`, `cargo test --workspace`, and `forge test` passed, but that is not sufficient for independent deployment signoff.

findings.title: Streaming wire-format success criteria remain unverified at review time
findings.evidence: Because the repository could not be inspected and tests could not be run, none of the streaming-specific acceptance criteria were directly observed in the checked-out code during this review.

evidence.label: stdout
sandbox_failure_exec_command
evidence.value: All shell-based inspection attempts failed before command start with `bwrap: loopback: Failed RTM_NEWADDR: Operation not permitted`.

evidence.label: sandbox_failure_js_repl
evidence.value: A Node REPL attempt to read `/home/drew/code/vllm-inference-blueprint` exited unexpectedly; kernel stderr ended with the same `bwrap` loopback permission error.

evidence.label: worker_report_only
evidence.value: Prior implementation worker reported all requested checks green and described the streaming implementation as complete, but that report was not independently validated in this session.

evidence.label: approval_decision
evidence.value: No explicit production approval is possible until repository access is restored and the code plus required commands are independently verified.
